questions.question: What does SVD decompose a matrix into?
options: Product of three matrices: U, Σ, V^T

questions.question: What do the singular values in Σ represent?
options: The scale factors that connect inputs to outputs
Direction vectors in the input space

questions.question: Explain why SVD is useful for model analysis and compression.

rubric.complete: Mentions rank, low-rank approximation, identifying important directions

questions.question: For a 3×3 matrix, how many singular values will SVD produce?
How does SVD relate to eigendecomposition? When do they differ?

rubric.complete: SVD works for any matrix, eigendecomposition for square symmetric matrices
